title: WON WARS
body:
Inspired by the german project troll wars.
contains:
- let´s do vinery
- simple voice chat (only voice chat edition)
- advanced netherite
- farmer´s delight
- alex mobs x naturalist
- create
- tetra
- additional structures
- tacz
- valkyrien skies
- lucky tnt
- unlucky tnt
- security craft

The modpack is mainly made for a server from my friends.
